exclusion_reason: Paper-auditor FAIL (gap 60%). Paper's Table 2 Panel A Col 1 baseline is multivariate with 6 reproductive policy variables + state linear trends + race controls; our pipeline can only fit a univariate TWFE on epillconsent18 alone. Same outcome, same data, but estimand is fundamentally different. Excluded 2026-04-19 from comparable subsample (N=53). Methodology reanalysis still recorded in skeptic_report.md for reference.

Paper-auditor FAIL (gap 28%). Paper's headline outcome is mortality (NCHS restricted-access data, not redistributable); our pipeline reanalyzes log earnings (BLS public data) — a fundamentally different outcome. Not a reproduction of the paper's substantive claim. Excluded 2026-04-19 from comparable subsample (N=53).

Paper-auditor FAIL (gap 62%). Paper's preferred Table 3 Col 3 spec uses county-specific linear time trends + multi-dimensional FE structure (county FE + conception-year FE + month-of-year FE + year×month interactions) which the template cannot replicate. Same outcome, same data, but template-imposed FE structure absorbs much less variation. Same sign (positive) but magnitude not comparable. Excluded 2026-04-19 from comparable subsample (N=53).
